'''[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Anet Karl''' was the ship surgeon on the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Urias Xhaxin]]'s [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Free Lance]]''. She was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman with long dark hair.

{{Char-stub}}
